Id1.text: Abel Caballero was born in Galicia, Spain. He was in office during Monarch, Juan Carlos I of Spain's reign. Francisco Franco was Carlos' predecessor.

Id2.text: Born in Galicia, Spain, Abel Caballero, was in office during the reign of Monarch, Juan Carlos I of Spain, who had succeeded Francisco Franco.

Id3.text: Abel Caballero, born in Galicia, Spain, was in office during the reign of King Juan Carlos I of Spain. The King was preceded as leader by Francisco Franco.
